summary: Frontend-only test of ContactsList.js Add/Edit Contact form enhancement. Verified the new 'Delivery Address' (emerald header + MapPin icon) and 'Alternative Contact' (sky header + UserPlus icon) sections, plus full round-trip persistence of alt_contact_name and alt_contact_phone via the UI. All assertions passed.
test_steps_verified: Click 'Add Contact' (data-testid=add-contact-btn) → right-side Sheet opens on Manual Entry tab

Delivery Address section: data-testid=contact-address-section present, contains text 'Delivery Address', has icon (MapPin svg), and wraps existing fields: contact-address-line1/line2/city/state/pincode/country and contact-maps-link (Google Places search input also rendered inside section)
Alternative Contact section: data-testid=contact-alt-section present, contains text 'Alternative Contact', has icon (UserPlus svg), with inputs contact-alt-name and contact-alt-phone present
Create contact (Category=Vendors, Name=TEST_AltCtc_21447, alt_name='Front Desk', alt_phone='+91 90000 22222') → Save Contact → Sheet closes, no error toast, contact appears in list (row matches=1)

Re-open contact via row Edit pencil (contact-edit-{id}) → Sheet opens in Edit mode → form-name='TEST_AltCtc_21447', contact-alt-name='Front Desk', contact-alt-phone='+91 90000 22222' (UI round-trip persistence PASSED)
critical_code_review_comments: ContactsList.js is 1278 lines — getting close to the 700-line guideline; consider splitting the Add/Edit Sheet into its own component (e.g. ContactFormSheet) for maintainability.

Inconsistent data-testid naming: name input uses 'form-name' and category trigger uses 'form-category' while the rest of the new sections use 'contact-*'. Harmless but worth aligning to a single convention.
seed_data_creation: Created+deleted one contact 'TEST_AltCtc_21447' (Vendors category) for round-trip verification; cleanup performed via row delete button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical Add Contact button testid is [data-testid="add-contact-btn"]. Name input testid is form-name (not contact-name) and category trigger is form-category. The Add/Edit Sheet uses Radix Sheet with an overlay that intercepts pointer events — when interacting with Select dropdowns inside it, click with force=True after a 500–800ms wait. Row actions: contact-share-{id}, contact-edit-{id}, contact-delete-{id}. Search uses [data-testid="search-input"].
